creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
when running pkg upgrade on an i386 I see this:

ldconfig:aout is not supported
pkg: POST-INSTALL script failed

this message have been seen when these packages were processed:
openssl
libffi
pcsc-lite
gobject-introspection
nss
curl
... and some others

After reading manuals for ldconfig and aout I have little idea what effects this may have on the running system and how to debug/fix it.
